creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/l10n.html
gives information that hasn't been useful since FreeBSD 4.6, when the
library mentioned was merged into libc.  This information can safely be
removed, and does not need to be replaced with anything else.

How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
